glosses.vi: cung cấp; lấp đầy vị trí
glosses.ro: a furniza; a ocupa un post
glosses.ja: 提供する; 欠員を補充する

sentences.target: L'entreprise pourvoit à trois postes en ce moment.
sentences.reading: /lɑ̃tʁəpʁiz puʁvwa a tʁwɑ pɔst ɑ̃ sə mɔmɑ̃/

translations.fr: L'entreprise pourvoit à trois postes en ce moment.
translations.ipa: /lɑ̃tʁəpʁiz puʁvwa a tʁwɑ pɔst ɑ̃ sə mɔmɑ̃/
translations.en: The company is filling three positions right now.
translations.es: La empresa está cubriendo tres puestos en este momento.
translations.de: Das Unternehmen besetzt gerade drei Stellen.
translations.it: L'azienda sta coprendo tre posizioni in questo momento.
translations.ko: 회사는 현재 세 개의 직무에 대해 채용 중입니다.
translations.zh-Hans: 公司目前正在招聘三个职位。
translations.yue: 公司而家招聘緊三個職位。
translations.pt: A empresa está preenchendo três vagas neste momento.
translations.tr: Şirket şu anda üç pozisyonu dolduruyor.
translations.vi: Công ty hiện đang tuyển dụng cho ba vị trí.
translations.ar: تعمل الشركة حالياً على سد ثلاث شواغر.
translations.nl: Het bedrijf vult op dit moment drie vacatures.
translations.hu: A cég jelenleg három pozíciót tölt be.
translations.hi: कंपनी अभी तीन पदों को भर रही है.
translations.pl: Firma w tej chwili obsadza trzy stanowiska.
translations.el: Η εταιρεία αυτή τη στιγμή καλύπτει τρεις θέσεις.
translations.nb: Selskapet besetter tre stillinger akkurat nå.
translations.id: Perusahaan saat ini sedang mengisi tiga posisi.
translations.sv: Företaget tillsätter tre tjänster just nu.
translations.ro: Compania ocupă în acest moment trei posturi.
translations.da: Virksomheden besætter tre stillinger lige nu.
translations.ja: 会社は現在、3つの職種を募集しています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article clitic before a vowel-initial noun; marks definiteness of the following noun.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; here used with the preposition 'à' to express filling/providing for positions.
Preposition introducing the PP complement of 'pourvoit' ('à trois postes').
Cardinal numeral modifying 'postes'.
Common noun, plural; head of the NP governed by 'à'.
Preposition starting a temporal PP ('en ce moment') indicating time.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'moment'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'en' in a temporal expression.

sentences.target: On doit pourvoir à ce poste rapidement.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ dwa puʁvwaʁ a sə pɔst ʁapidmɑ̃/

translations.fr: On doit pourvoir à ce poste rapidement.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ dwa puʁvwaʁ a sə pɔst ʁapidmɑ̃/
translations.en: We have to fill this position quickly.
translations.es: Tenemos que cubrir este puesto rápidamente.
translations.de: Wir müssen diese Stelle schnell besetzen.
translations.ko: 우리는 이 자리를 빨리 충원해야 합니다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们得尽快填补这个职位。
translations.yue: 我哋要盡快填補呢個職位。
translations.ru: Нам нужно быстро закрыть эту вакансию.
translations.he: אנחנו צריכים למלא את המשרה הזו בהקדם.
translations.vi: Chúng ta cần tuyển vị trí này nhanh chóng.
translations.nl: We moeten deze functie snel vervullen.
translations.uk: Нам потрібно швидко закрити цю вакансію.
translations.hu: Ezt a pozíciót gyorsan be kell töltenünk.
translations.hi: हमें इस पद को जल्दी भरना है.
translations.el: Πρέπει να καλύψουμε αυτή τη θέση γρήγορα.
translations.nb: Vi må fylle denne stillingen raskt.
translations.id: Kita harus mengisi posisi ini dengan cepat.
translations.sv: Vi måste tillsätta den här tjänsten snabbt.
translations.ro: Trebuie să ocupăm acest post rapid.
translations.da: Vi skal hurtigt besætte denne stilling.
translations.fi: Meidän täytyy täyttää tämä paikka nopeasti.
translations.ja: このポジションを早急に埋める必要があります。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun interpreted as generic 'one' or colloquial 'we'.
Modal verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; takes an infinitival complement.
Infinitive complement of 'doit'; with 'à ce poste' conveys the sense of filling a position.
Preposition introducing the NP complement of the verb ('à ce poste').
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'poste'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'à'.
Manner adverb modifying the predicate; indicates urgency.

sentences.target: Je pourvois aux besoins de ma famille.
sentences.reading: /ʒə puʁvwa o bəzwɛ̃ də ma famij/

translations.fr: Je pourvois aux besoins de ma famille.
translations.ipa: /ʒə puʁvwa o bəzwɛ̃ də ma famij/
translations.en: I provide for my family's needs.
translations.es: Me ocupo de las necesidades de mi familia.
translations.de: Ich sorge für die Bedürfnisse meiner Familie.
translations.it: Provvedo ai bisogni della mia famiglia.
translations.zh-Hans: 我为家人提供生活所需。
translations.yue: 我照顧屋企嘅生活所需。
translations.vi: Tôi chu cấp cho gia đình mình.
translations.nl: Ik voorzie in de behoeften van mijn familie.
translations.hi: मैं अपने परिवार की जरूरतों का ध्यान रखता हूँ.
translations.el: Φροντίζω τις ανάγκες της οικογένειάς μου.
translations.da: Jeg sørger for min families behov.

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject clitic pronoun.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; used transitively with a PP complement.
Preposition in contracted form ('à' + 'les'); introduces the plural NP 'besoins'.
Common noun, plural; head of the NP within the PP 'aux besoins'.
Preposition marking a noun complement ('besoins de ...').
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, feminine singular; modifies 'famille'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'de'.

sentences.target: Le poste est à pourvoir rapidement.

translations.fr: Le poste est à pourvoir rapidement.
translations.en: The position needs to be filled quickly.
translations.de: Die Stelle muss schnell besetzt werden.
translations.pt: A vaga precisa ser preenchida rapidamente.
translations.vi: Vị trí này cần được tuyển gấp.
translations.nl: De functie moet snel worden vervuld.
translations.hu: A pozíciót gyorsan be kell tölteni.
translations.hi: इस पद को जल्दी भरना आवश्यक है.
translations.el: Η θέση πρέπει να καλυφθεί γρήγορα.
translations.ja: このポジションは早急に埋める必要があります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; marks definiteness of 'poste'.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of the copular construction.
Auxiliary (copula), present indicative 3rd person singular.
Preposition forming the construction 'à + infinitif' indicating a prospective/passive meaning ('to be filled').
Infinitive; in 'à pourvoir' denotes that the position remains to be filled.
Manner adverb modifying the copular predicate; indicates speed/urgency.
